payload.prompt: Approve Trigram Expansion (EAV-194) and Infrastructure Execution?
payload.description: The CTO and CEO have both signed off on the technical necessity and safety of the Trigram Expansion. This is critical for Wave 2 performance. Please approve the pending infrastructure request [288b7547](/EAV/approvals/288b7547-8177-4d7e-a0f7-b60b15fb3e82) to unblock the DBA.
